children.name: hwIpMcastChannelSource
children.description: Source address of the entry.

children.name: hwIpMcastRouteNextHopTable
children.description:
The (conceptual) table containing information on the
            next-hops on outgoing interfaces for routing IP multicast
            datagrams.  Each entry is one of a list of next-hops on
            outgoing interfaces for particular sources sending to a
            particular multicast group address.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelDownstreamLimitBandWidth
children.description: The configured limit of bandwidth on this interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastEnable
children.description:
The enabled status of IP Multicast function on this
            system.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelInterfaceName
children.description: The name of interface on which this router most recently sent or received a CAC trap.

children.name: hwIpMcastInterfaceTable
children.description:
The (conceptual) table used to manage the multicast
            protocol active on an interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelDownstreamEntries
children.description: The total number of entries on the interface.

children.name: hwMcastEntryTotalCount
children.description: The limit of multicast routing total entries.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelDownstreamBandWidth
children.description: The value of bandwidth on this interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastOverloadGroup
children.description: The OverloadGroup of the trap.

children.name: hwIpMcastSGTotalCount
children.description: The total number of multicast routing (S, G) entries of all instances.

children.name: hwIpMcastOverloadAddressType
children.description: The OverloadAddressType of the trap.

children.name: hwMcastNotificationAddressType
children.description: The address type of the multicast group address.

children.name: hwIpMcastInstanceName
children.description: The instance name of the trap.

children.name: hwBoardIndex
children.description: The BoardIndex of the trap.

children.name: hwIpMcastCfgTotalLimit
children.description: The configured limit of global entries.

children.name: hwIpMcastDownstreamChannelTable
children.description:
The (conceptual) table used to list CAC limit and statistic 
            information for a channel on an interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastDownstreamChannelEntry
children.description:
An entry (conceptual row) containing the multicast protocol
            information for a particular interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastDownstreamChannelEntryStat
children.description: The total number of entries of this channel on the interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastDownstreamChannelIpVersion
children.description: The IP version of this row.

children.name: hwIpMcastDownstreamChannelIfIndex
children.description:
The index value that uniquely identifies the interface to
            which this entry is applicable.  The interface identified by
            a particular value of this index is the same interface as
            identified by the same value of the IF-MIB's ifIndex.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelName
children.description: Channel name limited by CAC on the interface.

children.name: hwIpMcastOverloadSource
children.description: The OverloadSource of the trap.

children.name: hwIpMcastRouteEntryCount
children.description:
The number of rows in the hwIpMcastRouteTable.  This can be
            used to check for multicast routing activity, and to monitor
            the multicast routing table size.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelGlobalEntries
children.description: The total number of entries on the router.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelInterfaceIfIndex
children.description: The interface on which this router most recently sent or received a CAC trap, or zero if this router has not sent or received a CAC trap.

children.name: hwIpMcastChannelGlobalLimitEntries
children.description: The configured limit of global entries.

children.name: hwIpMcastCfgTotalThreshold
children.description: The configured threshold of global entries.
